channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘Jumanji 3’ Is Moving Out of the Way of ‘Avengers: Doomsday’ and ‘Dune: Part Three’
item.description: Plus, Vincent D'Onofrio gets into character to explain why the Punisher isn't in 'Daredevil: Born Again' season 2.

item.title: 136 cœurs, 3 nm… Arm dévoile une première puce bien à lui, et elle dépote
item.description: Fabriquée en partenariat avec Meta, la toute première puce signée Arm, habituellement « simple » vendeur de propriété intellectuelle, se dévoile cette semaine. Ses 136 cœurs et sa gravure en 3 nm seront mis au service de l'IA agentique.

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which starts today and runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold […]

item.title: The OnePlus 15T launches with a huge battery and punchy price tag — but its global launch is already in doubt
item.description: The OnePlus 15T is now official, but there's speculation the company will revert to a China-only mode.

item.title: When Satellite Data Becomes a Weapon
item.description: As war reshapes the Gulf, the satellite infrastructure the world relies on to see conflict clearly is being delayed, spoofed, and privately controlled—and nobody is sure who is responsible.

item.title: Ring adds 4K to its battery-powered video doorbells
item.description: Ring has today announced a spec bump to its battery-powered video doorbells for all those folks who can’t wire their units to power. The flagship Battery Doorbell Pro (2nd gen) gets 4K video, with 10x zoom and the promise of far longer time between recharges than the previous model. At the same time, it’s bringing 2K imaging to its lower-end battery doorbells, the Battery Doorbell Plus and Battery Doorbell (2nd gen). The former, as fitting its higher price, gets a quick-release battery pack, while both models get 2K video and 6x zoom. Naturally, these features are already available on Ring’s w...

item.title: Dell made its new Pro laptops thinner and tweaked their naming scheme, again
item.description: Dell is announcing a new lineup of Pro laptops to go with its recent Precision line relaunch. The new models have rejiggered names: Dell Pro 3, Dell Pro 5, and Dell Pro 7. The Pro 3 and Pro 5 models come in 14- and 16-inch models, while the Pro 7 will come in 13- and […]

item.title: Reolink’s first solar-powered floodlight camera offers wire-free home security
item.description: Reolink's new solar-powered floodlight camera is now available. Announced earlier this year at CES, the Solar Floodlight Camera costs $109.99 but is on sale for $87.99 for the launch. Most floodlight cameras require hardwiring into your home's existing wiring, which can limit placement options and be difficult to install. Reolink's latest model can be mounted […]...

item.title: After pivoting, Y Combinator grad Glimpse raises $35M led by a16z
item.description: Glimpse announced on Wednesday a $35 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz, with participation from 8VC and YC.

item.title: Harbinger’s next product will be hybrid emergency vehicles
item.description: The young California startup is already building RVs, FedEx vans, and box trucks. Now its hybrid powertrain will underpin ambulances and mobile healthcare units.

item.title: Arinna raises $4M seed round to solve the space power problem
item.description: Arinna builds solar cells specifically for spacecraft and has developed an ultrathin new material that it expects to be far more flexible and more efficient than current technology.

item.title: With Sift Stack, two ex-SpaceX engineers are bringing the software that helped launch rockets to the factory floor
item.description: Sift is building the data infrastructure for advanced manufacturing.

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 5 on Apple TV?
item.description: Here's when the fifth episode of Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 will debut on Apple TV.

item.title: These cheap PS5 games offer hundreds of hours of entertainment and start at less than eight bucks
item.description: There are some fantastic PS5 games up for grabs right now, and these are the ones I'd recommend getting.

item.title: Xiaomi frappe fort : sa nouvelle clé HDMI 4K fait déjà de l’ombre au Chromecast grâce à cette offre
item.description: Compact, léger et désormais animé par Google TV, le Xiaomi TV Stick 4K 2nd gen est d'ores et déjà en promotion. La Fnac et Darty le proposent à 59,99 euros, alors que Xiaomi l'affiche, sur son site, à 69,99 euros.

item.title: Sony and Honda ain’t feelin’ the Afeela anymore
item.description: Sony and Honda have lost that lovin' Afeela. The joint venture announced today that it would be discontinuing the $90,000 Afeela 1 electric sedan, as well as the unnamed Afeela SUV concept, as it adjusts to slower EV demand and policy pullbacks. In a statement, Sony Honda Mobility (SHM) determined there was not a "viable […]

item.title: We’ve unified Apple’s strongest business offerings into one simple, secure platform': Apple Business will now offer MDM, upgraded iCloud storage and more — plus the option to put ads in Maps
item.description: Apple is replacing former Business Connect, Essentials and Manager tools into one single (free) Apple Business experience.

item.title: YouTube's biggest camera nerd ranks major brands for color accuracy — and it’s bad news for Fujifilm and Lumix fans
item.description: Gerald Undone has called on his experience with more than 50 cameras from leading brands.

item.title: I'm tempted to finally upgrade my aging laptop to the Lenovo LOQ with Ryzen 7 and RTX 5050 power now it's under $1000
item.description: Lenovo LOQ is a solid laptop for creatives, students, and power users — and it’s currently 36% off right now.

item.title: Bouygues Telecom prend une décision controversée au sujet des frais de résiliation
item.description: Bouygues Telecom généralise les frais de résiliation de 5 euros à l’ensemble de ses forfaits mobiles sans engagement. C'est le premier opérateur à mettre fin à la gratuité historique de la résiliation des abonnements mobiles.

item.title: Sennheiser's owners want to sell its consumer headphone business
item.description: Hearing aid company Sonova has put its Sennheiser consumer audio division on the auction block less than five years after acquiring it, the company announced on Reddit. "Today Sonova announced they intend to divest the business and will focus on Hearing Care," Sonova wrote, adding it intends to find "the right new owner." Sennheiser's consumer audio division mainly manufactures high-end headphones like the HD 400, HD 500, HD 600 and HD 800 series and recently launched the HDB 630, $500 wireless headphones aimed at audiophiles. The company's most (in)famous lineup is the HE series, which includ...

item.title: I gave myself a $100 budget — can I build the perfect home vlogging setup?
item.description: Looking for a super cheap vlogging setup to get started? I've looked through Amazon to find the perfect tech for under $100.

item.title: 'Please wait a little longer' urges Nintendo as Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness crashes on Nintendo Switch 2 — a fix is in the works
item.description: Nintendo tells Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness players that its investigating the game crashing on Nintendo Switch 2, and a fix is planned for the near future.

item.title: Prise en main : pourquoi le Galaxy A57 explose l’A37 cette année ?
item.description: Le Galaxy A57 se distingue par un design amélioré, plus fin et léger que son prédécesseur. Le Galaxy A37 présente peu d'évolution par rapport au A36, rendant son prix moins justifiable. Pour une expérience utilisateur optimale, le Galaxy A57 représente un meilleur rapport qualité-prix malgré un coût supérieur de 100 euros d'après notre première prise en main....

item.title: Galaxy A57 et A37 lancés : Samsung peaufine sa recette gagnante à moins de 600 euros
item.description: Samsung présente aujourd’hui deux nouveaux modèles milieu de gamme, le Galaxy A37 et Galaxy A57. Deux smartphones qui apportent chacun leur lot de petites nouveautés.

item.title: This ‘Star Trek Online’ Trailer Is Actually a Killer ‘Enterprise’ Documentary
item.description: The long-running 'Trek' MMO is celebrating multiple anniversaries in style, with a documentary tribute to the early days of interstellar exploration.

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 Phones Get Price Hikes
item.description: The Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 aren’t drastically different from their predecessors, but the $50 price bump is indicative of the economic climate.

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy A57 gets thinner, faster, and more expensive
item.description: Samsung has announced its two newest midrange phones, the Galaxy A57 and A37. Both phones benefit from a jump to IP68 water-resistance and some improved AI features, but the bigger upgrades are reserved for the A57, which is now thinner, lighter, and has a slimmer bezel around the display. The downside? They both also cost […]

item.title: I spent a morning with the Samsung Galaxy A57, and I'll be amazed if this isn't one of the best cheap phones of 2026
item.description: The Galaxy A57 is the latest entry in Samsung's increasingly impressive mid-range lineup – here are my first impressions of the new device.

item.title: A huge story spoiler for Daredevil: Born Again season 2 has already leaked online — and one of the Marvel TV show's lead actors is to blamefor the faux pas
item.description: One of the Disney+ show's biggest stars appears to have spoiled a major plot point for its second season.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 and A57 hands-on: The cheaper phone might be a winner
item.description: Late last year, Samsung launched its newest generation of affordable A-series phones, starting with the entry-level A17. Following the arrival of the flagship Galaxy S26 line, the company has returned to flesh out the rest of its midrange portfolio. The more affordable Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 sport some interesting upgrades, even when compared to some of their pricier siblings.Core specs and featuresBefore we dive into my hands-on impressions, I want to do a quick rundown of each phone's specs as that should help set up (or temper) expectations. As you'd expect based on their numbering, the ...

item.title: Vie numérique | OpenClaw : a-t-on vraiment trouvé le prochain ChatGPT ?
item.description: Au jeu des mots-clés qui titillent l’intérêt des adeptes de l’intelligence artificielle, la phrase suivante frappe le gros lot : OpenClaw est un agent d’IA autonome, gratuit et libre (open source) qui sert d’intermédiaire entre l’utilisateur et divers grands engins d’IA, par l’intermédiaire de l’interface d’une messagerie mobile. OpenClaw serait aussi, selon certains, le prochain ChatGPT. Rien de moins....

item.title: J’ai pris en main les Samsung Galaxy A57 et Galaxy A37 : toutes les différences et mes premières impressions
item.description: Les Samsung Galaxy A37 et A57 ont officiellement été présentés et j'ai déjà pu les prendre en main. Voici mes premières impressions et comparaisons en plus de toutes les informations importantes à connaître.

item.title: Fin de Sora | OpenAI se recentre sur des outils professionnels
item.description: Six mois seulement après un lancement tonitruant, OpenAI a annoncé mardi la fermeture de Sora, son réseau social de vidéos courtes générées par intelligence artificielle, illustrant son recentrage sur les agents IA et les outils professionnels.

item.title: Apple introduces age verification for iCloud accounts in the UK
item.description: Apple has introduced more than just new features, like an AI playlist generator, with iOS 26.4 in the UK. The company now requires users in the region to verify their ages and to prove they’re 18 years old or above before they can access “certain services or features, or take certain actions on their account.” Users can verify their ages in Settings by linking a credit card to their account or scanning an ID. For people who’ve had an Apple account for a while, the company will check if they already have a payment method on file that can prove they’re of age.The company says it will automatical...

item.title: I felt weird using ChatGPT in public so I tried this extension that disguises it as a Google Doc
item.description: GPTDisguise turns ChatGPT into a fake Google Doc, offering a funny but revealing workaround

item.title: 64 Go de RAM, RTX 5080 et 6 To de SSD : ce laptop gaming hors norme perd plus de 1000 euros
item.description: Le MSI Titan 18 HX AI porte parfaitement son nom avec sa configuration titanesque : écran Mini LED 4K de 18 pouces, RTX 5080, 64 Go de RAM et 6 To de SSD. Initialement affiché à 6 399 euros, ce monstre de puissance profite aujourd’hui d’une belle baisse de prix à 5 299 euros.

item.title: Europe’s innovation strategy is failing. Here’s how to fix it
item.description: Most companies based here are too advanced to compete with emerging markets, yet not agile enough to rival the high-tech innovation of the US and China.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Code gets ‘safer’ auto mode
item.description: Anthropic has launched an "auto mode" for Claude Code, a new tool that lets AI make permissions-level decisions on users' behalf. The company says the feature offers vibe coders a safer alternative between constant handholding or giving the model dangerous levels of autonomy. Claude Code is capable of acting independently on users' behalf, a useful […]...

item.title: Taxe Shein et Temu : un député alerte le gouvernement sur le fiasco logistique français
item.description: Nous vous l'annoncions dès le début du mois de mars : la nouvelle taxe française visant les colis des géants du e-commerce asiatique s'est transformée en un véritable désastre pour la logistique nationale. Le monde politique s'empare désormais du sujet face à des destructions d'emplois imminentes.

item.title: The Best Digital Wall Calendar (2026): Skylight, Apolosign
item.description: I was convinced these devices were just tabletop clutter. I was proven wrong.

item.title: Get the sleep you've been dreaming of this Spring with the ultimate mattress upgrade
item.description: The best hybrid mattresses under $1,000 in 2026 deliver incredible cooling, comfort and value for money

item.title: Shopping in ChatGPT is about to get a lot more interactive – users promised 'improved speed, relevance and product coverage'
item.description: Users are loving ChatGPT for product discovery and comparison, so OpenAI is making improvements on that front.

item.title: Volkswagen s’apprêterait à basculer vers l’économie de guerre : des équipements militaires à la place des voitures
item.description: Face à une crise financière historique et à la concurrence féroce de la Chine, Volkswagen envisage une solution radicale pour sauver les 2 300 emplois de son usine d'Osnabrück. Fini l'assemblage de SUV : le site allemand pourrait bientôt fabriquer des équipements lourds pour le célèbre Dôme de fer israélien.
